message:
Rename lint:linkcheck script to build:linkcheck

The link checking command performs a full build with validation
enabled, not just a linting pass. Rename the script to better reflect
its actual behavior and update all references accordingly.

Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,4 +97,4 @@ jobs:
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
 
       - name: Run link check
-        run: pnpm run lint:linkcheck
+        run: pnpm run build:linkcheck

@@ -9,14 +9,14 @@
     "preview": "astro preview",
     "astro": "astro",
     "generate:reference": "node scripts/generate-reference.js",
-    "lint": "pnpm run lint:markdown && pnpm run lint:eslint && pnpm run lint:prettier && pnpm run lint:linkcheck",
+    "lint": "pnpm run lint:markdown && pnpm run lint:eslint && pnpm run lint:prettier && pnpm run build:linkcheck",
     "lint:markdown": "markdownlint '**/*.md' '**/*.mdx' '**/*.mdoc' --ignore node_modules --ignore .astro",
     "lint:markdown:fix": "markdownlint '**/*.md' '**/*.mdx' '**/*.mdoc' --ignore node_modules --ignore .astro --fix",
     "lint:eslint": "eslint . --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx,.astro",
     "lint:eslint:fix": "eslint . --ext .js,.jsx,.ts,.tsx,.astro --fix",
     "lint:prettier": "prettier --check .",
     "lint:prettier:fix": "prettier --write .",
-    "lint:linkcheck": "RUN_LINK_CHECK=true pnpm build",
+    "build:linkcheck": "RUN_LINK_CHECK=true pnpm build",
     "lint:fix": "pnpm run lint:markdown:fix && pnpm run lint:eslint:fix && pnpm run lint:prettier:fix",
     "postinstall": "node scripts/fix-starlight-llms-txt.js"
   },

@@ -22,8 +22,8 @@ https://github.com/tenzir/docs. We use [Astro](https://astro.build) with
 | Command                | Action                                           |
 | :--------------------- | :----------------------------------------------- |
 | `pnpm lint:markdown`   | Lint all Markdown files                          |
-| `pnpm lint:linkcheck`  | Validate all internal and external links         |
 | `pnpm lint:prettier`   | Check code formatting                            |
+| `pnpm build:linkcheck` | Validate all internal and external links         |
 | `pnpm astro ...`       | Run CLI commands like `astro add`, `astro check` |
 | `pnpm astro -- --help` | Get help using the Astro CLI                     |
 
@@ -94,7 +94,7 @@ The documentation includes automated link validation to ensure all internal and
 Before submitting changes, run link checking locally to catch broken links:
 
 ```bash
-pnpm lint:linkcheck
+pnpm build:linkcheck
 ```
 
 This will build the site with link validation enabled and report any broken links found.
